soul_dominance.name: Perfect Cage (Yuji Type)
soul_dominance.special: Divergent Fist: physical hits create a second CE impact.
soul_dominance.risk: Sukuna takes control if HP < 5% (biq check vs threshold 6).

soul_dominance.name: Co-Existence (Megumi Type)
soul_dominance.special: Voluntary swap with Sukuna. Instant Malevolent Shrine access.
soul_dominance.risk: High — Sukuna may refuse to swap back.

domain.name: Malevolent Shrine
domain.effect: Slashing sure-hit in 200m radius. Cleave + Dismantle.

finger_milestones.unlock: Full King Mode — Sukuna full stats + near-infinite CE
